data.content:
Удав
Fictional snake with the ability to swallow large prey whole and remain immobile for 6 months after doing so, as mentioned in the text.<SEP>Large snake with a habit of swallowing its prey whole and resting for 6 months after doing so. A fictional creature from the text.

Хищный зверь
Wild animal that is preyed upon by the snake in the text.

Джунгли
Wild jungle where the story takes place and which is mentioned as having thrilling adventures.

Шляпа
Hat that was interpreted by the child to be a representation of the inside of the snake, as mentioned in the text.

Взрослые
Adults or older individuals mentioned in the text as characters who are described and interacted with by the child.

Китай
Geographical place in East Asia and one of the five ancient civilizations

Аризону
State in southwestern United States
